name: SocialDog
description:
Keep your X account barking with SocialDog. Specializing in managing and analyzing X accounts, the tool is ideal for brands hoping to grow on the former bird app. It's a favorite for its user-friendly interface and comprehensive features, including follower management, post scheduling, and detailed analytics. 

Here’s why you’ll love it:

  • With a free plan and premium plans starting at $16/month, you can upgrade your presence without breaking the bank
  • Ever wonder who’s really following you? Follower analysis gives you deep insights into your fans
  • Keep your eye on the prize with keyword alerts. SocialDog notifies you about specific keywords or hashtags whenever they’re mentioned, so you’ll stay in the know
  • X is the only supported platform, so it might not be your best bet for comprehensive social media management

Key Features:

✅ Follower management

✅ Advanced scheduling features

✅ Keyword monitoring
what_people_say:
What people say :

Social media mavens focusing on their X accounts consider SocialDog to be a go-to tool. Here’s what people say:

“SocialDog has transformed how we manage our X account. We’ve been using it for 6 months, and our followers have doubled. It helps knowing exactly who’s following us, so we can tailor our content instead of relying on guesswork.”

“It’s perfect for X analytics and scheduling. We just use Meta’s post scheduler for Facebook and Instagram. We’re running on a shoestring budget, so it works for us.”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Features for platforms other than X
  • 🚫 More advanced reporting features
  • 🚫 Integration with broader digital marketing tools
